dialogos.texto_en: Your fever has gone down. Good.
Yeah, I slept really well,\nand I feel completely fine now.
Thanks for taking care of me all this time.\nI couldn't have done it without you.
Oh, don't say that.\nI didn't do anything special.\nI just sat here with you.
No, that's not true.\nYou helped me a lot by holding my hand the whole time.
Ah... I guess your mother's charm really worked
Teehee, yeah, it seems so.
However, you still need to be careful\nand take it easy until you're completely better.\nIf there's anything you need, just let me know.
Okay.
So, do you want something to eat?\nIt seems like your appetite has come back\nnow that you're feeling better.
Well, I'm fine with room service...
Nah, I'll go buy something.\nIs there something you want?
I don't have anything specific in mind,\nso it's up to you.
Alright, I'll pick something out.\nContact me if something happens, okay?
Thanks, I'm looking forward to see \nwhat you'll end up getting me.
I'm a little nervous.\nI feel like I'm being tested.
Let's see.
(Hmm, I should probably get\n something easy to digest\n since she's still recovering%p-2;――%p;)
(Hmm? A text message?\n From Raiha, eh.)
We were supposed to go to the Valley of Gangala\nafter Okinawa World, but we cancelled it\nbecause we're still worried about Ichika-san.
We're going to buy a lot of souvenirs on Kokusai dori\nand then head back to the hotel.
(I guess they're coming back after all.\n ...Well, I can understand their concern.)
We're gonna buy a lot of food and come back,\nso don't eat, and wait for us!
(If that's the case,\n it seems like I don't need to go shopping.\n Should I take advantage of their kindness?)
I'm home.\nIchika, about dinner%p-2;――
Huh?
Ah...
WHAAAAA?!\nWh-h-wh-wh-why did you come back?!
Wh-why? Because this is my room!\nI-I mean, I'm sorry!
Don't look at me!\nTurn right! Just go to the bathroom for now!
G-got it!
*sigh*
I should have changed in the bathroom after all.\nI let my guard down...
Futaro-kun, you can come out now.
O-okay.
I'm sorry, Ichika!! \nI didn't think you'd be changing!
I-it's okay. You don't have to bow so much.
I'm in the wrong too. I started changing in \nyou and Raiha-chan's room,\nwithout asking. It's all good.
Ahaha...\nThis is such a typical thing \nyou would imagine happening, huh.
Typical?\nBut it's better not to have such an accident, right?
R-right. Sorry.
What I meant was, it might happen in the future,\nso it's good to experience it earlier...\nor something like that.
Huh? What are you talking about?
Wha?!\nDid I say something?
Didn't you say something\nabout it happening in the future?\nI didn't hear you clearly.
N-no!
(Oh no, I said it out loud.\n We haven't even talked about moving in together yet.)
What's your matter?\nYou've been acting weird for a while now.\nIf you have something to say, just say it clearly.
Well, umm...
Huh?!\nI-is someone coming?
Y-yeah, it's probably Raiha and your sisters.
We're back!
Ah, welcome back.
We're back.\nHow are you feeling, Ichika?
Huh? Why is everyone...?
You seem better now, Ichika-san. Good.
Ah, yes.\nThanks to Futaro-kun taking care of me the whole time,\nI'm feeling much better.
Her fever went down, too.
I'm glad to hear that.
Hmm? Are you really feeling better?\nBut your face is still red?
Huh?!\nTh-that's...
Your face is red too, Futaro.
Maybe it's just your imagination.\nHahahaha...
What happened? Tell us honestly, would you?
Nothing happened!\nRight, Futaro-kun?
Yeah, nothing happened!
A-anyway, why is everyone back already?\nWeren't you all still sightseeing?
Huh? Didn't you hear from Uesugi-san?
We were worried about you, Ichika,\nso we decided to cut the trip short.
Well, before we could talk about that,\nyou all came back.
Ah! But anyway, we enjoyed our sightseeing, you know?
Yeah, we did!\nAlso, we can enjoy Okinawa in this room, too.
In this room?
Ta-dah! THIS is what we mean!\nWe bought a lot of food from Kokusai dori!
Today, we changed our plans\nand decided to enjoy Okinawan cuisine in the room.
Wha...!
How's your appetite?\nIf it's still a little weak,\nwe also bought some light snacks.
No way! Actually, I'm super hungry!\nI'm going to eat a lot to cheer myself up!
But you're still recovering from your illness, right?\nYou should probably avoid eating too much.
How about this? Pork and egg rice balls.\nThey're apparently eaten for breakfast in Okinawa.
Oh! It has a local feel to it. Nice!
We also bought some fruits, fresh tarts,\nand drinks like sanpin-cha and juice.
Th-that's a lot of food.\nCan we finish it all?
No problem!
(...Even though Itsuki said a couple words,\n they were very convincing.)
Wow, what Nino's eating looks delicious!\nI'm gonna take one.
Oh, come on!\nWe bought plenty, you can eat your own!
But it looked so tasty! Now, what should I eat next?
Oh, right! Yotsuba-san, didn't you buy shaved ice?\nYou need to eat it quickly before it melts.
Ah! That's right!
Ahaha! It's probably turned into water by now, huh?
I told you not to get it.
We should have bought frozen fruit instead, right?
Wow, they sell that here too?\nOkinawa has such an abundance of fruits.
(Ichika and everyone seem to be having fun.\n I was worried for a moment, but I'm relieved now.)
Uesugi-kun?\nWhy are you grinning like that?
Nah, I just thought it looked delicious.
Then, please help yourself.
The food here serves as Ichika's get-well present,\nand is also our way to thank you, Uesugi-kun.
Yep, I'll dive in.
If you need more, please let me know.\nI'll go and buy some for you!
I'm really glad Ichika is feeling better.
Ahaha, sorry for making you worry.
I'm so relieved that it wasn't a serious illness.
It's good to see you eating properly.
Just be careful not to overdo it and get sick yourself.
I'll be careful.
Uesugi-kun, don't hesitate to take more if you want to.
If you take too long, Ichika will eat it all!
Yep, I'll dive in.
I was thinking how nice of a scene this is.
Huh...?
When you're all together, laughing and having fun.\nI guess I've gotten used to it,\nbut it's not something that's always guaranteed.
...Now is it YOU who's sick, Uesugi-kun?
Ooh...
(Yeah, I guess I said something corny just now.\n Is it because of the trip's mood?)
Please pretend you didn't hear that...
But I did hear it.
Ichika?!
I don't see why you should be embarrassed about it.\nAfter all, I felt the same way as you did.
It's not something that's always guaranteed.\nThat's why we have to cherish it.
...Yeah.
